name: research-review
description: Parallel repository and requirements research, synthesis, independent review, and bounded revision.

repo_research.description: Inspect the repository and collect implementation-relevant evidence.

requirements_research.description: Analyze the requested outcome, acceptance criteria, and edge cases independently from repository research.

writer.description: Synthesize the two research streams into one actionable proposal and revise it from reviewer feedback.

reviewer.description: Independently verify the proposal against repository evidence and acceptance criteria.
